Product
Free your data from documents.
A toolbox of flexible APIs for all your needs.
Parse
Reducto's parser reads documents like a human would—capturing layout, structure, and meaning with high accuracy. Our Agentic OCR reviews and corrects outputs in real-time for near-perfect results, even on edge cases.
Learn more
Reducto's parser reads documents like a human would—capturing layout, structure, and meaning with high accuracy. Our Agentic OCR reviews and corrects outputs in real-time for near-perfect results, even on edge cases.
Learn more
Split
Automatically separate multi-document files or long forms into individually useful units. Intelligent heuristics and layout-aware splitting keep your pipelines clean and efficient—no manual pre-processing needed.
Learn more
Extract
Extract structured data directly from documents with schema-level precision. Whether it's invoice fields, onboarding forms, or financial disclosures, Reducto ensures the right data lands exactly where you need it.
Learn more
Edit
Fill in detected blanks, tables, and checkboxes with supplied data. No bounding boxes or pre-defined templates are required; Edit dynamically identifies fillable elements regardless of document layout or format, supporting scanned PDFs, digital forms, and complex multi-page documents.
Learn more
Use cases
Powering the world's best AI teams.
Trusted across industries where accuracy matters—finance, healthcare, legal, and more.
Try your own
Use cases
Finance
Extract key insights from investor decks, huge spreadsheets, dense pitch materials, and SEC filings. Reducto handles complex tables, charts, and financial statements with precision.
Get started
Reducto helped us parse documents we previously could not because of table complexity. It's probably the only AI product that has actually worked for us.
Engineering Leader, Top 5 Global Hedge Fund
How it works
Built to read the way humans do.
Reducto’s multi-pass system utilizes both OCR and vision language models for unmatched accuracy and reliability.
Traditional computer vision
Reducto first uses layout-aware models to break down the document visually, capturing regions, tables, figures, and text.
VLMs make corrections to mistakes
Like a human editor, our Agentic model can detect minor mistakes and correct them, ensuring accuracy even in the most detailed cases.
VLMs review Reducto's outputs
Vision-language models then interpret each region in context—linking labels to values, understanding tables, and classifying segments.
Features
The all-in-one agentic document platform.
Reducto's wide feature set covers the long tail of your processing needs, out of the box.
Layout extraction
Handle everything from massive tables to handwritten forms while preserving bounding boxes and structure.
File type support
Support for PDFs, images, spreadsheets, slides, and more—all through one API.
Language support
Multilingual parsing across 100+ languages, including mixed-language docs.
LLM optimized
Intelligent document chunking, embedding optimization, and everything else you need to make your data LLM-ready.
Image support
OCR for scanned pages, faxes, and handwritten content—accurate even with low quality.

llm_raw.description: An agentic document processing platform that provides APIs for parsing, structuring, extracting, and editing complex document data using vision-language models.
llm_raw.notes: Positioned as a developer-first platform with explicit focus on 'toolbox of flexible APIs' for AI teams.
